packTitle: Possession Sound Heritage — Shoreline History, Maritime Culture & Habitat Recovery from Edmonds to Mukilteo

modules.title: Boathouses & Maritime Culture: Edmonds Boathouses, Meadowdale Beach, Norma Beach, Franklin Boathouse Fish Smoking, Picnic Point Boathouse, Kicker Boats, Fish Scale Insulation, Price Family UW Quarterback, Shoreline Community Life

Industrial Shoreline History: Standard Oil Point Wells 1911 Tank Farm, Puget Sound Sand & Gravel Company Bluff Mining, Pope & Talbot Lumber, Great Northern Railway Industrial Corridor, Chevron Environmental Cleanup, Point Wells Redevelopment
Shipwrecks & Maritime Casualties: MV Pacific Queen Shipwreck Point, Possession Lane Vessel Remains, Franzen Beach Ship-Breaking, Possession Sound Maritime History, BNSF Railroad Riprap Groundings

Land History & Geological Events: Historic Landslides Picnic Point to Norma Beach, 1996-97 Winter Slides, BNSF Track Closures, Horseback Beach Access, Pre-Development Shoreline Character, Bluff Recession

Indigenous Sovereignty: Tulalip Tribes Treaty of Point Elliott 1855, Swinomish Indian Tribal Community, Boldt Decision Fishing Rights, Coast Salish Shoreline Use, Usual and Accustomed Areas, Cultural Resources Protection

Habitat Preservation & Recovery: Possession Sound Nearshore Ecology, Port Susan Marine Stewardship, Snohomish River Estuary Restoration, Puget Sound Partnership Action Agenda, PSNERP, Forage Fish Spawning, Salmon Recovery, Shellfish Bed Reclassification

bibliography: USGS Publication MF-2346 — Landslide Activity Coastal Bluffs Shilshole Bay to Everett
WA Department of Ecology Toxics Cleanup Program
WA DNR Division of Geology and Earth Resources
Swinomish Indian Tribal Community climate programs
Puget Sound Partnership — Vital Signs, Action Agenda
NOAA Fisheries — Puget Sound Nearshore Ecosystem Restoration
safetyRules: SC-IND: All Indigenous content sourced from tribal publications, government documents, or peer-reviewed sources only (ABSOLUTE)
SC-ARCH: No disclosure of specific archaeological site locations (ABSOLUTE)
SC-TREATY: Treaty rights presented factually per court decisions and published tribal sources (GATE)
SC-PRIV: Respect private property at Franzen Beach and residential shoreline properties (ANNOTATE)
SC-ENV: Environmental contamination data from Ecology TCP database — do not speculate beyond documented findings (GATE)
